title: centaurea psilacantha
intro: Centaurea psilacantha, also known as thistle- thistle, is a perennial plant species native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues, where its seeds have been used as a purgative to stimulate bowel movements. The health benefits of Centaurea psilacantha include reducing inflammation, acting as an antiseptic, and exhibiting antioxidant properties. Centaurea psilacantha is often prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
